input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.3.16.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.3.16.5
            TITLE: cost event scoring may include normalizing the scores of different judging teams and scaling

            CONTENT:
            rule S.3.16.5: Cost Event scoring may include normalizing the scores of different judging teams and scaling
S.3.16.5 Cost Event scoring may include normalizing the scores of different judging teams and scaling 
the results.
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 123 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer: Cost Event scoring may include normalizing the scores of different judging teams and scaling the results.
